task_description: retrieve the number of contributors in the requests GitHub repository

messages.content:
```python
import subprocess

# Use git command to fetch contributors from the requests GitHub repository
result = subprocess.run(['git', 'shortlog', '-sne'], capture_output=True, text=True)

# Check if the command was successful
if result.returncode == 0:
    # Print the number of contributors
    print("Number of contributors:", len(result.stdout.splitlines()))
else:
    # Print an error message if the command failed
    print("Failed to retrieve contributors:", result.stderr)
```

```python
import requests

# Use GitHub API to get the number of contributors
response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/repos/psf/requests/contributors')

# Check if the request was successful
if response.status_code == 200:
    # Print the number of contributors
    print("Number of contributors:", len(response.json()))
else:
    # Print an error message if the request failed
    print("Failed to retrieve contributors:", response.text)
```
